test_cases.name: AC1 - Ticket Before Processing (Uncompleted) refunded via RDR is set to Cancelled

steps.action: Identify a single-payment ticket with status 'Uncompleted' (Before Processing)
steps.data:
Ticket status: Uncompleted
Payment type: single
steps.expected_result: Ticket is in Before Processing group.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket and record it in CRM
steps.data: RDR refund event recorded in CRM (see VISASGF-580)
steps.expected_result: Refund is persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify the ticket status after the automation runs
steps.expected_result: Ticket status is updated to 'Cancelled'.

test_cases.name: AC1 - Ticket Before Processing (Completed - ticket level) refunded via RDR is set to Cancelled

steps.action: Identify a single-payment ticket with ticket-level status 'Completed' (not related to service status)
steps.data:
Ticket status: Completed (ticket-level)
Payment type: single
steps.expected_result: Ticket is classified as Before Processing.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund is persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify the ticket status after the automation runs
steps.expected_result: Ticket status is updated to 'Cancelled'.

test_cases.name: AC1 - Ticket Before Processing (Pending) refunded via RDR is set to Cancelled

steps.action: Identify a single-payment ticket with status 'Pending' (Before Processing)
steps.data:
Ticket status: Pending
Payment type: single
steps.expected_result: Ticket is classified as Before Processing.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund is persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify the ticket status after the automation runs
steps.expected_result: Ticket status is updated to 'Cancelled'.

test_cases.name: AC1 - Ticket After Processing (Approved) refunded via RDR remains unchanged

steps.action: Identify a single-payment ticket with status 'Approved' (After Processing)
steps.data:
Ticket status: Approved
Payment type: single
steps.expected_result: Ticket is classified as After Processing.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund is persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify the ticket status after the automation runs
steps.expected_result: Ticket status remains 'Approved' (no change).

test_cases.name: AC1 - Ticket After Processing (Denied) refunded via RDR remains unchanged

steps.action: Identify a single-payment ticket with status 'Denied' (After Processing)
steps.data:
Ticket status: Denied
Payment type: single
steps.expected_result: Ticket is classified as After Processing.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund is persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify the ticket status after the automation runs
steps.expected_result: Ticket status remains 'Denied' (no change). No service actions triggered (handled by existing logic).

test_cases.name: AC1 - Ticket After Processing (Recycled) refunded via RDR remains unchanged

steps.action: Identify a single-payment ticket with status 'Recycled' (After Processing)
steps.data:
Ticket status: Recycled
Payment type: single
steps.expected_result: Ticket is classified as After Processing.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund is persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify the ticket status after the automation runs
steps.expected_result: Ticket status remains 'Recycled' (no change).

test_cases.name: AC2 - Before Processing: THC, Embassy and Fee Protection services are cancelled when not final

steps.action: Identify a Before Processing ticket with additional services THC, Embassy and Fee Protection in non-final statuses
steps.data:
Ticket group: Before Processing
Services: THC (active), Embassy (active), Fee Protection (active)
steps.expected_result: Services are in non-final statuses.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify each additional service status after automation runs
steps.expected_result: THC, Embassy and Fee Protection statuses are updated to 'cancelled'. Ticket status is set to 'Cancelled'.

test_cases.name: AC2 - Before Processing: services already in final status (cancelled/processed/used) are not overridden

steps.action: Identify a Before Processing ticket with services already in final statuses
steps.data: Services: THC (processed), Embassy (used), Fee Protection (cancelled)
steps.expected_result: Services are in final statuses.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify each additional service status after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Service statuses are preserved (THC=processed, Embassy=used, Fee Protection=cancelled). Ticket set to 'Cancelled'.

test_cases.name: AC2 - Before Processing: Card service follows existing secondary ticket cancellation logic

steps.action: Identify a Before Processing ticket with a Card service linked via a secondary ticket
steps.data: Services: Card (associated to a secondary ticket)
steps.expected_result: Card service is linked to a secondary ticket.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify the Card service and secondary ticket after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Card service is handled by the existing secondary ticket cancellation logic (no duplicate or conflicting updates).

test_cases.name: AC2 - After Processing (Approved): Embassy and THC cancelled only if not in final status

steps.action: Identify an After Processing (Approved) ticket with Embassy (non-final) and THC (final - processed)
steps.data:
Ticket status: Approved
Services: Embassy (active), THC (processed)
steps.expected_result: Embassy is non-final, THC is final.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify services after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Embassy is updated to 'cancelled'. THC remains 'processed'. Ticket status remains 'Approved'.

test_cases.name: AC2 - After Processing (Approved): Fee Protection is always cancelled

steps.action: Identify an After Processing (Approved) ticket with Fee Protection service (any non-final status)
steps.data:
Ticket status: Approved
Services: Fee Protection (active)
steps.expected_result: Fee Protection is present and not cancelled.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify Fee Protection status after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Fee Protection is updated to 'cancelled' regardless of previous non-final status. Ticket status remains 'Approved'.

test_cases.name: AC2 - After Processing (Approved): Card is cancelled only if not in final status

steps.action: Identify an After Processing (Approved) ticket with a Card service (non-final)
steps.data:
Ticket status: Approved
Services: Card (active)
steps.expected_result: Card service is in non-final status.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify Card service after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Card service is updated to 'cancelled'. Ticket status remains 'Approved'.

test_cases.name: AC2 - After Processing (Denied): no service actions are taken by this automation

steps.action: Identify an After Processing (Denied) ticket with non-final additional services
steps.data:
Ticket status: Denied
Services: Embassy (active), THC (active), Fee Protection (active), Card (active)
steps.expected_result: Ticket is Denied with non-final services.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify services and ticket after automation runs
steps.expected_result: No service statuses are modified by this automation (handled by existing logic for Denied tickets). Ticket remains 'Denied'.

test_cases.name: AC3 - eSIM service is never modified by the RDR refund automation

steps.action: Identify a refunded ticket (any group) that includes an eSIM service and eSIM product
steps.data:
Services include: eSIM (any status)
Product: eSIM
steps.expected_result: eSIM service and product are present.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Verify eSIM service and product after automation runs
steps.expected_result: eSIM service status and eSIM product are unchanged. Other applicable AC1/AC2 updates still apply to non-eSIM elements.

test_cases.name: AC4 - Split payment: primary transaction refunded applies AC1 + AC2

steps.action: Identify a split-payment Before Processing ticket with additional services in non-final statuses
steps.data:
Payment type: split
Refunded transaction: primary
Services: THC, Embassy, Fee Protection (active)
steps.expected_result: Primary transaction can be refunded.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund on the primary transaction
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM for primary transaction
steps.expected_result: Primary refund persisted.

steps.action: Verify ticket and services after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Ticket is set to 'Cancelled' (AC1) and all non-final services are cancelled per AC2. Card follows secondary ticket logic.

test_cases.name: AC4 - Split payment: secondary transaction refunded does not change ticket, only affected services

steps.action: Identify a split-payment ticket where a secondary transaction is linked to specific services
steps.data:
Payment type: split
Refunded transaction: secondary
Affected services: Embassy (active), Fee Protection (active)
Other services: THC (active)
steps.expected_result: Secondary transaction affects only a subset of services.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund on the secondary transaction
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM for secondary transaction
steps.expected_result: Secondary refund persisted.

steps.action: Verify ticket and services after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Ticket status is unchanged. Only services affected by the secondary transaction are cancelled if not final (Embassy, Fee Protection). Unaffected services (THC) remain unchanged.

test_cases.name: AC4 - Split payment: secondary transaction does not cancel services already in final status

steps.action: Identify a split-payment ticket where secondary-linked services are already in final status
steps.data:
Payment type: split
Affected services: Embassy (processed), Fee Protection (used)
steps.expected_result: Affected services are already final.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund on the secondary transaction
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM for secondary transaction
steps.expected_result: Secondary refund persisted.

steps.action: Verify affected services after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Final services are not overridden. Ticket status unchanged.

test_cases.name: AC5 - Safe reprocessing: running the same RDR twice does not create inconsistent states

steps.action: Identify a ticket already processed by the RDR automation (ticket cancelled, services updated, logs present)
steps.data:
Ticket: previously processed by RDR automation
Expected state: Cancelled with services updated per AC2
steps.expected_result: Ticket and services are in the post-processing state.

steps.action: Reprocess the same RDR event (idempotency check)
steps.data: Same RDR reference replayed
steps.expected_result: Automation executes without errors.

steps.action: Verify ticket, services and logs after reprocessing
steps.expected_result: No duplicate status changes; services remain in their already-updated state; no inconsistent intermediate states; reprocessing is logged without creating conflicting entries.

test_cases.name: AC6 - Logging: every ticket/service update is recorded with old/new status and RDR reference

steps.action: Identify a Before Processing ticket with non-final services (THC, Embassy, Fee Protection)
steps.data: Services: THC (active), Embassy (active), Fee Protection (active)
steps.expected_result: Ticket is ready for refund.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM with a unique RDR reference
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Inspect the logs after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Logs include: ticket ID, each service updated, old status, new status, and the RDR reference. One entry per updated entity.

test_cases.name: AC6 - Logging: no-op scenarios are still traceable (After Processing Approved with all services final)

steps.action: Identify an After Processing (Approved) ticket with all services in final status
steps.data:
Ticket: Approved
Services: THC (processed), Embassy (used), Fee Protection (cancelled)
steps.expected_result: No status changes are expected.

steps.action: Trigger an RDR refund for the ticket
steps.data: RDR refund recorded in CRM
steps.expected_result: Refund persisted in CRM.

steps.action: Inspect the logs after automation runs
steps.expected_result: Logs indicate the RDR reference and that no updates were applied (or explicit 'no-op' entries) so the run is traceable.

test_cases.name: Regression - Example tickets referenced in the user story are processed correctly

steps.action: Run the RDR automation against the reference tickets provided in the story
steps.data: Tickets: 13795121, 14021163, 14026403 (Before Processing examples)
steps.expected_result: Automation picks up the tickets from CRM.

steps.action: Verify ticket statuses after the automation runs
steps.expected_result: Each ticket is updated to 'Cancelled' per AC1.

steps.action: Verify additional services and logs for the three tickets
steps.expected_result: Non-final services are cancelled per AC2 (respecting eSIM exception and Card secondary-ticket logic). Each update is logged with old/new status and RDR reference.
